chapter_title.en: Reward of a patient person, blind and lover of Ahle Bayt (a.s.)

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1.  Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) says, “One who is patient and blind and hopeful of divine rewards and is a lover of the progeny   of   Muhammad   (s.a.w.s.)   there   would   be   no accounting of deeds for him.”
